personal.name: Berkay Senler
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with clean code and creative solutions
personal.bio: Passionate software engineer with a love for creating elegant solutions to complex problems. I specialize in full-stack development with a focus on modern web and desktop technologies and user experience design.

frontend.name: React
frontend.description: Built multiple responsive web applications using React hooks, context API, and component libraries. Experience with state management and performance optimization.

frontend.name: TypeScript
frontend.description: Developed type-safe applications with TypeScript, implementing interfaces, generics, and advanced type patterns for better code maintainability.

frontend.name: Next.js
frontend.description: Created full-stack applications using Next.js App Router, SSR, and API routes. Implemented SEO optimization and dynamic routing.

frontend.name: Tailwind CSS
frontend.description: Proficient in utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development. Built custom design systems and responsive layouts.

frontend.name: HTML/CSS
frontend.description: Strong foundation in semantic HTML and modern CSS features including Grid, Flexbox, animations, and responsive design principles.

backend.name: Node.js
backend.description: Built RESTful APIs and real-time applications using Express.js, implemented authentication, middleware, and database integration.

backend.name: Python
backend.description: Developed web applications with Django and Flask, data analysis scripts, and automation tools. Experience with object-oriented programming.

backend.name: PostgreSQL
backend.description: Designed and optimized relational databases, wrote complex queries, and implemented data modeling for web applications.

tools.name: Git
tools.description: Version control with branching strategies, merge conflict resolution, and collaborative development workflows using GitHub.

tools.name: AWS
tools.description: Deployed applications using EC2, S3, and Lambda. Configured CI/CD pipelines and managed cloud infrastructure.

tools.name: Jest
tools.description: Wrote unit and integration tests for JavaScript applications, implemented test-driven development practices and code coverage.

tools.name: Figma
tools.description: Created UI/UX designs, prototypes, and design systems. Collaborated with developers to implement pixel-perfect interfaces.

projects.title: VU AI Assistant
projects.description: AI-powered chatbot for Victoria University students, answering course-related questions using NLP and knowledge base integration.

projects.description: Native Android application built for the final assignment, featuring REST API integration, authentication, and RecyclerView listing.
